scripts.push-all-changes: git add . && git commit -m"update" && git push origin
scripts.fetch-all: git fetch origin && git merge origin/master
scripts.update: git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/master && npm install && npm install corp-chat-library-antd-react-socket@latest --save --save-exact && npm install corp-notificator-library-antd-react-socket@latest --save --save-exact && npm run build
